programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: The buyers compete with a swarm of bidders; power tools and antique clocks await the winners.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: In the city of DeSoto, Ricky and Bubba hope to obtain an antique mannequin; a mystery bidder sets his sights on a locker containing Willie Nelson memorabilia.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy finagles some vintage outdoor accessories; Dave is subjected to an unexpected audit; Emily's departure spoils a buyer's day.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny finds relief in a locker; Brandi joins forces with Mary; Dave makes a historic discovery.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Riverside, Lisa dons her cowboy garb and brings her money sock along; Rene sinks his teeth into an unassuming unit; Brandi gets to go on a scavenger hunt; Ivy and his boys get a glimpse of retired life; Darrell just isn't feeling like himself.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The bidders battle in Garden Grove, Calif.; Dave raids King Tut's tomb; Darrell forms a new business "adventure" in Germany.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy is on the warpath in Lancaster, doing his best to intimidate the other buyers, and he won't be losing any sleep over it; Brandi begrudgingly lets Bozek decide which locker they buy; Dusty goes up against the King to prove a point.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Gardena, Calif., the buyers gamble on a sportsman's locker and a load of construction equipment; Barry arrives with a secret weapon.

programme.title: Late Night Law
programme.desc: On a snowy road in Alaska, officers set up sticks to try and stop a vehicle on the run; in Illinois, officers help a drunk biker get home; Police in Nevada respond to a house fire where the victims claim arson.

programme.title: Late Night Law
programme.desc: Troopers in Arizona engage in a high-speed vehicle pursuit with spike strips; in Florida officers use pepper balls to subdue a suspect; when officers in Missouri receive a report involving an alleged gunshot victim, they arrive on scene to find something they didn't expect.

programme.title: Late Night Law
programme.desc: An Arizona trooper encounters a man who won't stop laughing; in North Carolina, officers close in on an alleged murder suspect; Police in Florida respond to a disturbance and the suspect proves difficult to handle.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Salinas, police discover a backseat full of beer cans that may explain why one man chose a traffic light for his nap; in Missoula, officers help corral a group of wild horses blocking the roadway.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: A modified muscle car in Greene County raises suspicion; in Richland, officers investigate reports of shots fired; a Pasco County deputy and K9 join as special guests.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Officers in Richland County investigate a suspected double carjacking; in Warwick, a driver causes a serious crash tied to road rage; in Salinas, police search for a suspect believed to be hiding in a residence.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Officers in Franklin assist in a pursuit of a suspected robbery suspect; in Warwick, a driver suspected of DUI takes a sobriety test but faces an unexpected wardrobe issue; in Pasco, surveillance and a warrant lead to an arrest.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Officers in Pasco make a dangerous discovery; Dan, Tom and Sticks talk self-defense; cops keep their cool during a situation in the desert.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Officers are on the hunt for burglars in Nye County; Deputy Carmack makes a key arrest in Pasco County, while Danny Brown is on the chase in Richland during a suspected drug bust; police team with animal control for a bunny rescue in Warwick.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Officers in Texas search for Charlotte the pig; Extraterrestrial visitors in Nye County; Salinas officers encounter a scene that's a complete dumpster fire.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Officers respond to a beer bash in El Paso; a serious car accident in Pasco County; a suspected store casing in Pinal County.

programme.title: Late Night Law
programme.desc: In Rhode Island, officers pull over a car riding on a rim and discover it's full of drugs; the canine crew in North Carolina is called into a traffic stop when it's discovered the car has fake tags; in California, officers respond to a call about shots fired.

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Get Your Kicks on Route 666: Frasier takes the guys on a road trip to rediscover his 'inner man', but things don't go to plan. Carla hires a relative to help out at the bar.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla's psychic adviser decides to retire and asks Carla to take over her business, but Carla worries that she doesn't have 'the gift'.

programme.desc: When Ray and Debra draw up their wills, their choice of replacement guardians for the kids doesn't go down well.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
